name: My slip and fall claim at work got denied, now what?
description: Appeal fast with lawyer—get hearing to overturn denial.

mainEntity.name: My slip and fall claim at work got denied, now what?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal fast with lawyer—get hearing to overturn denial.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal the denial within 20 days in Utah or promptly in Idaho via hearing request.** Common reasons: late notice or not work-related.[1] Key factors: (1) Gather more medical proof; (2) Attorney represents at administrative law judge; (3) Success rate high with counsel. Don't accept denial. File appeal and sue if third-party fault.
